title: fix: route suno model to generateSunoMusic in GET /audio/:text
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Suno finds its voice
gist.blurb: Fixed a little hiccup where asking for Suno music gave you spoken text instead. The GET endpoint is back to dropping beats instead of reading scripts!
gist.summary: Fixed a routing bug in the GET /audio/:text endpoint that caused model=suno requests to incorrectly fall back to text-to-speech instead of generating music.
gist.impact: Users can once again generate Suno music directly via simple GET requests without it turning into spoken audio.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot wearing tiny DJ headphones, fixing a tangled audio cable connecting to a retro boombox. The monitor robot companion is dancing to the music.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny DJ headphones, plugging a lime green (#ecf874) audio cable into a retro boombox. A chunky pixel robot with a monitor head dances nearby with musical notes floating in the air. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
